w:r.w:t: Cloud Nine Mall, Mohamed Naguib Axis, New Cairo

Terms & Conditions: All above prices are inclusive of 14% value added tax (VAT). By signing this form, the customer has agreed to the above price, understands the warranty extended to installed products and confirms that all belongings have been removed from the vehicle. The company is not responsible for any damage to the vehicle’s paint in case of poor-quality paintwork regardless of this being original factory paintwork or not.
The wrapping of recently painted body parts may result in damage to the paint.
The customer agrees to full payment of the above price before receiving the vehicle. The company is not responsible for battery damage.
The customer is agreeing to uninstalling car parts necessary to the installation process unless requested otherwise.
